allRMAThis finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:31:28 UTC.12/07/2018
This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor) >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
James J. Eyster papers
Eyster, James J.
28-2-2327
5.7 cubic feet. 5.7 cubic feet.
1969-1998. Course materials, reports, and publications. Course materials for courses; research reports; a student housing project study from the University of Pennsylvania; presentation and consulting notes for various hotels; research interview notes; publications; lecture notes and the Homeless Program Summary. Collection material in English 2023960
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
August 2016
EAD encoding:
Marcie Farwell, August 2016
Date modified:
RMC Staff, August 2016
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Professor of Hotel Administration, Cornell University.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Course materials for courses in Financial Analysis and Planning, Hospitality Financial Management, Integrated Case Studies in the Hospitality Industry, and Financial Accounting; research reports, primarily from the firm of Laventhol & Horwath; a student housing project study from the University of Pennsylvania; presentation and consulting notes for various hotels; research interview notes; publications; lecture notes and the Homeless Program Summary.
Cite As:
James J. Eyster papers, #28-2-2327. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Bars (Drinking establishments) -- Finance. Taverns (Inns) -- Finance. Hotels -- Finance. Hotel management schools. Hotel management -- Study and teaching. Homeless persons. Cornell University. School of Hotel Administration University of Pennsylvania
2023960 <<<<<<< HEAD Link to a finding aid.

School of Hotel Administration. First printing, January 1977; second printing, March 1977; third printing, April 1978; fourth printing, March 1979. Reviews of the Book appeared in Real Estate Review (Spring 1978) and Hotel and Motel Management (April 1977).The Negotiation and Administration of Hotel Management Contracts19805

The Cornell Quarterly, November 1973, pp. 6-12. Review of this article appeared in The Market Information Guide (February 1974). The article was reprinted by The Cornell Quarterly as part of its series entitled "The Hotel-Motel Feasibility Study."Insuring Your Profit Margin1974-19785
